creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
In aumix 2.2 I forgot to initialize a variable when calculating the size
of the GTK+ window, so it is often the wrong size.  Here's a patch that
corrects the bug.

How-To-Repeat: 
Compile aumix 2.2 with the GTK+ interface and run it under X.  The bug
will not necessarily show up.
